name: How do I prove damages if an AI service tanked my law firm's visibility in Phoenix?
description: Use analytics showing lost traffic/clients; expert proof of causation.[4]

mainEntity.name: How do I prove damages if an AI service tanked my law firm's visibility in Phoenix?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use analytics showing lost traffic/clients; expert proof of causation.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Show lost clients/revenue via analytics, before-after comparisons, and expert testimony.[4] Link drop in AI search rankings to service failure.[4] Key factors: baseline visibility data; competitor benchmarks; causation evidence excluding other causes.[1] Track Google Analytics, client inquiries; hire digital forensics expert; document contract breaches.[4] Quantify with financial records for strong claim.
